case_title: ARACELY BAUTISTA MEJIA VS. ROBELIO ADONIAS YOC CASTANON

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT YOC CASTANON, ROBELIO ADONIAS MAILED TO RESPONDENT MEJIA, ARACELY BAUTISTA
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FILED BY YOC CASTANON, ROBELIO ADONIAS MEJIA, ARACELY BAUTISTA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-29-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-29-2016 BY JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ARACELY BAUTISTA MEJIA WITH COURT PROVIDED SPANISH INTERPRETER NINA SAFDIE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ROBELIO ADONIAS YOC CASTANON WITH COURT PROVIDED SPANISH INTERPRETER MANTI HENRIQUEZ. PARTIES STIPULATE TO HEARING BEFORE JPT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT MEJIA, ARACELY BAUTISTA RECOVER FROM APPELLANT YOC CASTANON, ROBELIO ADONIAS $2,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $10.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,610.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-16-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: THURSDAY, FEB-16-2017: 11:00 a.m.: THE CAUSE COMES ON CALENDAR THIS DAY FOR SMALL CLAIM APPEAL WITH BOTH SIDES PRESENT IN PROPRIA PERSONA WITH THE COURT AND COURT PERSONNEL PRESENT OFF THE RECORD. APPELLENT ROBELIO ADONIAS YOC CASTANON PRESENTS STATEMENTS TO THE COURT, FOLLOWED BY RESPONDENT BAUTISTA PRESENTING STATEMENTS TO THE COURT; THE COURT RECEIVES, READS AND REVIEWS DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES, FOLLOWED BY ADDITIONAL STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES. THEREUPON, AFTER HEARING ADDITIONAL TESTIMONY AND REVIEWING DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE, THE COURT THEREUPON TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

PRO TEM JUDGE: DIANA B. KRUZE; CLERK: MARJORIE L.MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 525).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-30-2016 Judgment Entered
